title: Transaction Timeline Screen
objective: Build a scrollable, filterable transaction timeline grouped by month, with visual grouping of split receipt rows and transfer pairs. Filters: owner_label, category, project.
execution_steps: Create TimelineViewModel: collect all transactions Flow, apply filters (owner_label, category_id, project_id), group by month
Build TimelineScreen with LazyColumn: month header separators, regular rows, split-receipt grouped rows (indented children), transfer pair indicator
Implement filter bar: owner_label chip, category picker, project picker — all optional, combinable
System-generated rows (OPENING_BALANCE) shown with a distinct system indicator, not hidden
REVALUATION and RECONCILIATION_ADJUSTMENT shown with distinct icons/labels (⚖, 📈/📉)
Write ViewModel unit tests: month grouping, category filter, project filter
Manual check: record transactions, verify month grouping, test filters
definition_of_done: Transactions in descending date order with month separator headers
Category, owner_label, and project filters all work correctly
